title: Reusable Food Commercial Poster
sourceTitle: Renaissance Food Double Juice Burger Commercial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable food commercial poster with appetizing food hero image with styled plating, controlled surface details, and commercial lighting. Render juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties as a Dutch Golden Age or Italian Renaissance oil painting, hyperrealistic with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. Place the hero dish front and center on dark velvet or stone, ingredients arranged in a baroque composition all around it. Add the dish name in gilded ornate typography at the top: "DOUBLE JUICE BURGER". Product: juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties. Product Category: burger. Ingredients: beef patties, melted cheese, lettuce, onion rings, secret sauce, and brioche bun. Selling Points: juicy bite, cheese pull, smoky sauce, crispy texture layers. Food Style: warm caramel commercial food photography with dramatic steam and sauce shine. Headline Text: DOUBLE JUICE BURGER. Subject: Make juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in the scene, surface, props, and context implied by this source cue: Render juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties as a Dutch Golden Age or Italian Renaissance oil painting, hyperrealistic with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use food commercial poster prompt layout preserving these mechanics: food hero appetizing closeup, ingredient/selling-point controls, readable commercial poster or infographic layout. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in warm caramel commercial food photography with dramatic steam and sauce shine. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Render juicy double cheeseburger with thick beef patties as a Dutch Golden Age or Italian Renaissance oil painting, hyperrealistic with dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.
